name: NUT VM
description: Network UPS Tools (NUT) is a service for monitoring and managing uninterruptible power supplies. This VM script creates an Ubuntu 24.04 VM with NUT pre-configured in netserver mode, USB UPS passthrough, and offline disk customization via virt-customize.

notes.text: Requires a USB UPS connected to the Proxmox host. The script will prompt for USB passthrough during setup.
VM credentials and NUT users are configured interactively during the installation.
On first boot, the nut-detect service scans the USB bus and auto-configures the correct UPS driver.
